_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_azure.azure_security_list_assessments. Mirrors oap-azure-mcp src/server.py azure_security_list_assessments (lines ~4985-5016) which iterates client.assessments.list(scope=/subscriptions/<id>) from the Azure SDK SecurityCenter client. Each entry carries name, id, display_name, status (Healthy/Unhealthy/NotApplicable), severity (High/Medium/Low), description, categories. The 5 representative findings below cover the canonical Defender for Cloud concern areas: public storage, missing MFA, unencrypted SQL, NSG SSH exposure, public web-app endpoint.

assessments.name: f0c1b1aa-1111-aaaa-bbbb-ccccdddd1111
assessments.display_name: Storage accounts should restrict network access
assessments.description: Storage accounts that allow public network access can be reached from any client on the internet. Restrict access via private endpoints or service endpoints to reduce exposure to data-exfiltration attacks.

assessments.name: f0c1b1aa-2222-aaaa-bbbb-ccccdddd2222
assessments.display_name: MFA should be enabled for accounts with owner permissions on your subscription
assessments.description: Multi-factor authentication is not enabled on at least one owner account. Owners can escalate privileges and modify policy; MFA significantly reduces the blast radius of a compromised credential.

assessments.name: f0c1b1aa-3333-aaaa-bbbb-ccccdddd3333
assessments.display_name: Transparent Data Encryption on SQL databases should be enabled
assessments.description: One or more SQL databases in this subscription do not have Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) enabled. Enable TDE to encrypt data at rest in the database files and backups.

assessments.name: f0c1b1aa-4444-aaaa-bbbb-ccccdddd4444
assessments.display_name: Management ports of virtual machines should be protected with just-in-time network access control
assessments.description: Several VMs expose SSH/RDP management ports broadly. Enable just-in-time VM access to require time-limited approval for inbound management traffic instead of allowing 0.0.0.0/0.

assessments.name: f0c1b1aa-5555-aaaa-bbbb-ccccdddd5555
assessments.display_name: Web Application should only be accessible over HTTPS
assessments.description: A web app allows plain HTTP traffic. Enable 'HTTPS Only' to redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS and prevent cleartext credentials being captured by a man-in-the-middle.
